name: Awesome Lockpicking
description: Adds a new skill - Lockpicking! Vanilla style chance based lockpicking action, speed and success affected by skill level. <LINE><LINE>Right click a door. In the context menu, there will be a new option for lockpicking the door. You can use a paperclip and screwdriver, but the paperclip may break on failure. <LINE><LINE>I have added a couple of unique items to help! <LINE>- A craftable Forged Lockpicking Tool Set - Improves lockpicking success chance over paperclip and screwdriver. Can be crafted at any forge with two small metal pieces. Recipe unlocks at Lockpicking level 3 and Blacksmithing level 3. <LINE>- A rare lootable Professional Lockpicking Tool Set - Highest success chance bonus. Can be researched to unlock forged set with at least level 1 in Lockpicking and Blacksmithing. <LINE><LINE>Each of the lockpicking set items have durability, with the professional set lasting significantly longer. Both break into "Broken Lockpicking Tools" which cannot be used. <LINE><LINE>New Trait: Locksmith - Gives the player lockpicking +2 and a +75% XP bonus. <LINE><LINE>New Profession: Master Locksmith - Gives the Locksmith trait and an additional +2 Lockpicking with 2 points left to spend. Gives the player a set of Professional Lockpicking Tools to start with.<LINE><LINE>The mod also adds a set of skill books for the new skill. <LINE><LINE>The mod settings include a global success chance multiplier and whether to allow high security door picking - default false. <LINE><LINE>Coming Soon: +1 Lockpicking with Burglar occupation, 3d models for all new items, lockpicking vehicles, Multiplayer, bug fixes and polish! <LINE><LINE><LINE>Note: Not reccomended to use this mod with any other lockpicking mod.
